title: AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework
use_when: AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework. Use when the user needs a product workflow for decision making related to ai product evaluation from recommendation canvas framework. Trigger terms: pm, decision-making, ai-product, recommendation-canvas, strategy.
do_not_use_when: Do not use AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework decision-framing brief with issue tree, assumptions, options, and recommended next step
framework_fit: AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework fits Strategy work in the Think lifecycle when the user needs AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework decision-framing brief with issue tree, assumptions, options, and recommended next step and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework decision-framing brief with issue tree, assumptions, options, and recommended next step without tying recommendations to the user's Think stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework as generic Strategy advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $ai-product-evaluation-from-recommendation-canvas-framework to turn this evaluation context into a decision-ready AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework decision-framing brief with issue tree, assumptions, options, and recommended next step.
examples.expected_artifact: AI product evaluation from Recommendation Canvas framework decision-framing brief with issue tree, assumptions, options, and recommended next step
